overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European town at night. The character navigates narrow cobblestone alleys illuminated by torchlight, passes through a covered market area, encounters guards, and emerges onto a waterfront path. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with warm firelight contrasting against the cool night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with wooden stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow cobblestone alley lined with wooden market structures and burning braziers

entered.detail: metal brazier with flames providing warm orange light against the stone wall
small wooden hut with sloped roof and weathered planks
tall medieval stone wall with rough texture
tattered fabric awning stretched between wooden poles overhead
abandoned wooden wagon with broken wheels
open fire pit with flames illuminating the covered walkway
thick timber post supporting the fabric canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone alley at night, illuminated by burning braziers. Wooden shacks and market stalls line the path, with fabric canopies stretching overhead. Geralt walks forward through this enclosed medieval market area, passing an abandoned wooden cart.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with fabric awnings and fire pits

events.description: character stops walking and turns around to survey the surroundings behind him
exits the covered canopy area into a more open cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: pauses to turn and look around the covered market area before continuing out into the open street

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase leading up to a higher level of the building

segments.scene_description: Under the fabric canopy, Geralt pauses to turn and observe his surroundings before continuing. The space is lit by fire pits and torches. He then exits the covered walkway into a slightly more open cobblestone street, leaving the market stalls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone street with wall-mounted torches

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow passage between high stone walls, approaching a group of guards carrying torches

notable_agents.action: group of three guards in red armor carrying torches walking toward Geralt

entered.detail: wall-mounted iron torch bracket with burning flame
wooden rain barrel standing against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow stone corridor lit by wall-mounted torches. A group of three guards in armor carrying torches approaches from the opposite direction. The passage is tight with stone walls on both sides and a wooden barrel visible near the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley leading to stone archway gate

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow alley, passing a shirtless man with tattoos on his back

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with red hair and extensive back tattoos walking ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: large medieval stone archway forming a gate through the city wall
simple wooden picket fence along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The alley continues toward a large stone archway in the distance. Geralt follows behind a shirtless man with prominent back tattoos. The stone walls remain high on the right while a wooden fence appears on the left. The path remains cobblestone as it approaches the city gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront path with dock structures and cranes

events.description: passes through the stone archway from the enclosed city into the open waterfront area
crescent moon becomes visible in the night sky as the character emerges from the narrow streets

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway and continuing along the waterfront path toward the docks

notable_agents.action: guard standing with torch near the archway entrance watching the character pass

entered.detail: patches of grass and vegetation alongside the cobblestone path
tall stone warehouse building with small windows facing the water
wooden pier structures extending into the water with mooring posts
large wooden crane for loading cargo onto ships
bright crescent moon visible in the cloudy night sky
elevated wooden platform along the waterfront edge
hanging lanterns illuminating the dock area

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the stone archway into an open waterfront area, transitioning from the enclosed city streets to the harbor. A guard stands watch near the gate. The path opens up to reveal wooden docks, cargo cranes, and the night sky with a visible crescent moon. The environment shifts from narrow stone corridors to a wider cobblestone path with grass verges and maritime structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic medieval market that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit harbor. It begins in a narrow cobblestone alley lined with wooden shacks and fabric canopies, moving past abandoned carts under the warm glow of burning braziers. As Geralt exits the covered walkway, the scene shifts into a tight stone corridor where the camera tracks him past wall-mounted torches and a group of armored guards. The path then narrows further between high stone walls and wooden fences, following a tattooed man toward a distant stone archway. Finally, the camera passes through the gate, transitioning from the enclosed city streets to an expansive waterfront area featuring wooden docks, cargo cranes, and a clear night sky with a crescent moon.
